calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-29-2001 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Small Claims Appeal, November 29, 2001. Andrea Hom, Esq., appears for appellant, Wells Fargo; respondent Martin J. Becker appears in pro per, with witness Mario Del Puerto. Mr. Becker and Mr. Del Puerto are sworn and examined. Evidence is admitted and withdrawn by the parties. The matter stands submitted.
